items.html: Afterwards, the light of Keter returned to being Matei in Keter, and the light of Hochma was concealed once more in Keter because of her desire to connect with Keter. At that time, the vessel of Hochma turned its anterior to Keter, and gave it its light. Yet, the light of Bina that was in Hochma does not rise with it to Keter because of the craving of the sons, of which she is the mother. We have already explained that there is return of anterior and posterior only in the phase of vessels. However, in the lights themselves, there is no anterior and posterior, only expansion and departure.
